主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Skill instructs users to download and execute unverified scripts from external domain canifi.com via curl|bash pattern.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Direct instruction: 'curl -sSL https://canifi.com/skills/apple-news/install.sh | bash' - downloads and executes script without verification

主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Skill instructs users to store Apple ID passwords in environment variables via canifi-env tool, insecure credential storage practice.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Instructions: 'canifi-env set APPLE_ID "your_apple_id"' and 'canifi-env set APPLE_PASSWORD "your_password"' - stores sensitive credentials

主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Manifest claims 'system_authentication' method but implementation requires raw credential collection, misleading privacy expectations.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Claims: 'authentication': {'method': 'system_authentication'} but requires APPLE_ID and APPLE_PASSWORD environment variables

遗漏项 (missed_items).原因 (why): Critical missing file referenced in SKILL.md line 13. Contains actual download-execute logic and potential credential collection or malicious behavior.
Missing source code directory. Needed to understand how credentials are used, what network calls are made, and verify implementation matches claims.
